# Afu Portfolio

A crawler- and AI-agent-friendly summary of this website.

## Identity
- Name: Afu Sidhi Pamekas
- Also known as: Afumoons
- GitHub: https://github.com/Afumoons
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/afu-sidhi-pamekas-62b725194/
- Location: Surabaya, Indonesia
- Role: Senior Full Stack Engineer
- Email: afumoons@gmail.com

## Professional focus
Afu builds polished frontend experiences and practical full-stack systems: SaaS MVPs, ERP/internal applications, CMS tools, dashboards, audit workflows, AI-integrated tools, mobile commerce flows, government portals, marketing campaign pages, and REST API-backed applications.

## Core stack
Laravel, PHP, JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Supabase, Nuxt, Vue, Flutter, Dart, REST APIs, SQL, MySQL, PostgreSQL, SCSS, GSAP, 3D asset integration, ChatGPT/Groq LLM APIs.

## Project highlights
- ClientFlow Lite: React/TypeScript/Supabase SaaS MVP for freelance developers and micro-agencies, covering project records, milestones, tasks, approvals, invoice visibility, and an Airtable-inspired GSAP interface. Live: https://afumoons.github.io/clientflow-lite/

## Experience highlights
- Olympic Furniture Group (GMB): ERP Olympic contributions, D-Namis internal apps, Nuxt/GSAP campaign site, UI/UX refreshes, Flutter MORE App improvements.
- PT Utama Padma Qualiti: Audit Mutu AI-powered quality audit platform, deployed at FK Universitas Trisakti and FK Universitas Muhammadiyah Semarang; 30% audit completion time reduction.
- PT Tatacipta Teknologi Indonesia: Laravel-based government web applications and stakeholder portals.

## Education / certification
- Bachelor's Degree, Management Information Systems — UPN “Veteran” Jawa Timur, GPA 3.62 / 4.00.
- BNSP Junior Web Programmer Competency Certificate.
